description_long: This object is a compact analog synthesizer keyboard with a retro design, featuring a wooden chassis and a black control panel. The front section displays a set of piano-style keys, likely spanning two octaves, with black and white coloration. Above the keys, the control panel is equipped with multiple rotary knobs, switches, and input/output jacks, suggesting a range of sound-shaping capabilities. The side panels are angled and made of wood, giving the instrument a classic, vintage appearance. The rear section is mostly flat and unadorned, likely housing connection ports for audio and power. The overall build is robust, with a combination of wood, plastic, and metal components.
description: A vintage-style analog synthesizer keyboard with a wooden frame, black control panel, and piano keys. It features multiple knobs and switches for sound control.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full keyboard, control panel with knobs and switches, and the wooden frame.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the angled wooden panel and the depth of the keyboard.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the flat back panel, mostly featureless except for the wooden frame.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the angled wooden panel and a partial view of the control panel and keys.
